description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/charts/alpine-helm Docker image. Define two stages: test and release. Add a lint job in the test stage that runs helm lint . and is excluded from the master branch. Add a release-chart job in the release stage that runs curl --fail --request POST --form "token=$CI_JOB_TOKEN" --form ref=master https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/2860651/trigger/pipeline and runs only on the master branch.
